rulings.Case Title: DANIEL WOODY et al VS. CADELINIA & LEUNG, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 5, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Chicago Title Insurance's Demurrer to Third Amended Complaint. Hearing Required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TELMATE,LLC VS. THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 5, 2013, line 4 - PLAINTIFF TELMATE,LLC's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint. Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Defendant may appear ex-parte with requests to shorten response and notice time for necessary discovery in this case. Defendant must show by declaration of counsel that such specific discovery is necessary in order to defend against constructive eviction cause of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE KELLY VS. GEORGE POON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Motion To Strike Prayer For Punitive Damages In First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 5, 2013, line 10 - Defendants George Poon and Pete Davis DBA Norcal Realty's Motion To Strike Prayer For Punitive Damages In First Amended Complaint. Defendants' Motion to Strike Prayer for Punitive Damages is sustained with leave to amend to allege a high degree of probability of dangerous consequences and what those consequences are. Gawara v. Unites States Brass Corp. (1998) 63 Cal.App.4th 1341, 1361. Plaintiff shall file amended complaint within 10 days from the Notice of Entry of Order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. BEVERLY C. SASSUS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc And Mtn For Order For Prejudgment Possession
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 5, 2013, line 5 - PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Amended Motion For Order For Prejudgment Possession. Plaintiff's Motion for Order for Pre-judgment Possession is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALINA BANH VS. HANG HO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Hang Ho And Anh Tuyet Nguyen'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 5, 2013, line 9 - Defendants Hang Ho And Anh Tuyet Nguyen'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint. Defendants' Motion to Strike Portions of Complaint is GRANTED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by motion to strike. Plaintiff shall file amended complaint within 10 days from the Notice of Entry of Order. Defendant's counsel is ordered again (See CGC-13-529899) to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EPMI, A BAYSIDE COMPANY VS. NICOLE SIBLEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 5, 2013, line 6 - Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement. Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement is GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ABDEL KADAR CHENBOD et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 5, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to August 19, 2013 per stipulation of the parties. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRUSTEE, HELEN MOORE TRUST VS. LESANNE CASSULO
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 5, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT LESANNE CASSULO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file amended complaint within 10 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/REQ)
